message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "client" as client1
actor "alcor" as alcor1
package "sessions" as sessions1

client1 -[hidden]-> client2
alcor1 -[hidden]-> alcor2
sessions1 -[hidden]-> sessions2

client1 .> alcor1 : send publickey
alcor1 .> sessions1 : create session
alcor1 .> client1 : send id and publickey

actor "client" as client2
actor "alcor" as alcor2
package "sessions" as sessions2

@enduml
```
